findings.title: HSTS not enabled on HTTPS endpoint
findings.recommendation: Enable HSTS (start with short max-age, then increase; consider includeSubDomains/preload).

findings.title: Missing security header: referrer-policy
findings.recommendation: Set Referrer-Policy to reduce referrer leakage.

findings.title: Missing security header: permissions-policy
findings.recommendation: Set Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

findings.title: Server header disclosed
findings.recommendation: Consider minimizing server banner information if not needed.

findings.title: X-Powered-By header disclosed
findings.recommendation: Disable X-Powered-By to reduce technology fingerprinting.
